options.markdown:
### Detailed Dashboards

| Dashboard | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| [Infrastructure](/app/search/cisco_mdt_infrastructure) | CPU, Memory, DRAM, Environment, Stack, Hardware, HA |
| [Network](/app/search/cisco_mdt_network) | Interfaces, VLANs, STP, ARP, MAC, LLDP, CDP |
| [Routing](/app/search/cisco_mdt_routing) | BGP, OSPF, RIB/FIB, VRF, DHCP, NTP |
| [Power & PoE](/app/search/cisco_mdt_power) | PoE Budget, Modules, Port Detail, PSU, Sensors |
| [Security](/app/search/cisco_mdt_security) | 802.1X, TrustSec, MACsec, MKA, ACLs, TCAM |
| [Telemetry Health](/app/search/cisco_mdt_telemetry) | MDT Subscriptions, Data Volume, Connections |

options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.software-version_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Software Version" | fields Switch "Software Version" | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.boot-time_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Boot Time" | fields Switch "Boot Time"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-system-data.last-reboot-reason_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Reboot Reason" | fields Switch "Reboot Reason"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.part-number_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" hw-type="hw-type-chassis" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as PID | fields Switch PID] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.device-inventory.serial-number_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" hw-type="hw-type-chassis" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Serial Number" | fields Switch "Serial Number"] | stats values("Software Version") as "Software Version" values("Boot Time") as "Boot Time" values("Reboot Reason") as "Reboot Reason" values(PID) as PID values("Serial Number") as "Serial Number" BY Switch | sort Switch
| mstats latest("cisco.content.five-seconds") as cpu_5sec WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" span=5m | tail 1

| mstats latest("cisco.content.used-memory") as used latest("cisco.content.total-memory") as total WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.encoding_path="Cisco-IOS-XE-memory-oper:memory-statistics/memory-statistic" cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name | where name="Processor" | eval pct=round(used/total*100, 1) | fields pct

| mstats latest("cisco.content.consumed-poe-power") as consumed latest("cisco.content.power-budget") as budget WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | eval pct=if(budget>0, round(consumed/budget*100, 1), 0) | stats avg(pct) as pct

| mstats avg("cisco.content.five-seconds") as "5 Sec" avg("cisco.content.one-minute") as "1 Min" avg("cisco.content.five-minutes") as "5 Min" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id span=5m

| mstats avg("cisco.content.statistics.in-octets") as in_octets avg("cisco.content.statistics.out-octets") as out_octets WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name span=5m | where NOT match(name, "Null0|Loopback") | eventstats sum(in_octets) as total_in BY name | sort -total_in | head 200 | chart limit=10 avg(in_octets) as "In Octets" avg(out_octets) as "Out Octets" BY _time name

| mstats latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.current-reading") as Reading latest("cisco.content.environment-sensor.state_info") as state_flag WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY name location cisco.node_id value | eval State=coalesce(value, "-") | rename cisco.node_id as Switch name as Sensor location as Location | where NOT match(Sensor, "^$") | table Switch Location Sensor Reading State | sort Switch Location Sensor

title: Cisco IOS XE — MDT Overview
description: Model-Driven Telemetry via OTEL Collector — System Health at a Glance
